name: image_load_side_load_robform
raw_query: any where (file.path like~ ("*\\roboform.dll", "*\\roboform-x64.dll")) and (not ((process.executable like~ (" C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Siber Systems\\AI RoboForm\\*", " C:\\Program Files\\Siber Systems\\AI RoboForm\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\robotaskbaricon.exe", "*\\robotaskbaricon-x64.exe"))))
